__comment: FarmSense Brew — Grafana Dashboard: Agronomist View
__instructions: Import this JSON in Grafana Cloud: Dashboards → Import → Paste JSON
Set your MySQL data source as 'farmsense-mysql' before importing
Panels: Temperature map, Humidity trends, Soil moisture per node, CLR Risk gauge, Alert log
title: FarmSense Brew — Agronomist View

targets.rawSql: SELECT node_id AS metric, clr_risk AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE recorded_at = (SELECT MAX(recorded_at) FROM sensor_readings sr2 WHERE sr2.node_id = sensor_readings.node_id) ORDER BY node_id
SELECT recorded_at AS time, temperature AS value, node_id AS metric FROM sensor_readings WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY recorded_at
SELECT recorded_at AS time, humidity AS value, node_id AS metric FROM sensor_readings WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY recorded_at
SELECT recorded_at AS time, soil_pct AS value, node_id AS metric FROM sensor_readings WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY recorded_at
SELECT created_at AS Time, node_id AS Node, risk_level AS Risk, alert_message AS Message FROM clr_alerts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
